title: CryptoKey
description: A Google Cloud KMS cryptographic key resource used for encryption, decryption, signing, or verification operations.

name.description: Resource name of the crypto key.

primary.description: The primary version of the crypto key.

name.description: Resource name of the crypto key version.

state.description: Current state of the key version.

protectionLevel.description: Protection level of the key version.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the version was created.

generateTime.description: Timestamp when the key material was generated.

purpose.description: Immutable purpose of the crypto key.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the key was created.

nextRotationTime.description: Timestamp of the next scheduled key rotation.

rotationPeriod.description: Rotation period of the key in seconds format.

versionTemplate.description: Template describing settings for new crypto key versions.

labels.description: Labels applied to the crypto key.

importOnly.description: Whether this key may contain imported versions only.
